products.title: PS902 2-Amp Power Supply
products.description: Get consistent output to your access control system with the highly configurable PS902 2-amp power supply.

products.title: PS904 4-Amp Power Supply
products.description: View the PS904 4-amp power supply. It delivers a clean and consistent output to your access control system, protecting downstream devices.

products.title: PS906 6-Amp Power Supply
products.description: Meet your access control system needs with the factory and field configurable PS906 6-amp power supply. Designed to deliver a clean output.

products.title: PS914 Power Supply for Panic Exits
products.description: The Von Duprin PS914 4-amp power supply is designed for use with panic exits requiring high in-rush current.
